name: Feast of Decay
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] {Counter} and inflict [Arg2] Temp. {STR⯆} on all enemies. If in an {Ultra Round}, deal DMG equal to your {Counter} to all enemies instead of inflicting {STR⯆}.
lore: The feast has reached its peak. The queen of Cambrian laughed heartily, raising her glass to you amidst the revelry and D-Slime.
